title: Vanilla Reimagined by Jashan_Maan
description: Vanilla Reimagined is a Minecraft modpack that keeps the original feel of the game while adding small, meaningful improvements. It focuses on enhancing visuals, gameplay mechanics, and quality of life without changing the core experience too much.
body:
# 🌿 Vanilla Reimagined

> A modern take on Vanilla Minecraft — same charm, reimagined feel.

Vanilla Reimagined is a carefully curated Fabric modpack that enhances the base game with smoother animations, aesthetic visuals, better UI, and small but powerful quality-of-life upgrades — all while keeping the **soul of vanilla** intact.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🎮 **Immersive Animations** — Fresh Animations, Eating Animation, and Entity Model Features bring mobs and actions to life.
- 🔧 **Quality of Life Improvements** — Better Beds, Better F3, Clearer Slots, Shulker Tooltips, and much more.
- 🌄 **Visual Enhancements** — Lighty Light, Falling Leaves, Particle Rain, FullBright, and zoom tools.
- 📦 **Enhanced UI/UX** — Minimal HUD tweaks, cleaner item slots, toggleable tooltips, and more intuitive menus.
- 🌍 **Optimized Performance** — Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and other optimization mods for buttery-smooth gameplay.
- 🧱 **Resourcepack Support** — Includes multiple fresh resourcepacks that enhance mobs, blocks, containers, and UI.
- 🌞 **Shader Friendly** — Comes preloaded with Complementary Reimagined, BSL, FastPBR, Kappa, and more!

---

## 🧩 Mods Included (Highlighted)

| Mod Name              | Description                             |
|----------------------|-----------------------------------------|
| Sodium + Lithium     | Performance boost without breaking style |
| Fresh Animations     | Brings mobs to life                     |
| BetterThirdPerson    | Play with new angles                    |
| Falling Leaves       | Adds aesthetic falling leaf particles   |
| Continuity + Iris    | Seamless connected textures + shaders   |
| BetterF3             | Customizable debug screen               |
| FullBright           | Toggle lighting without night vision    |
| Xaero’s Minimap      | Lightweight and clean minimap           |
| Entity Texture Features | Dynamic mob skins and models        |
| Better Beds + Fancy Beds | Visual rework for beds             |

...and many more!

---

## 🎨 Resourcepacks

Enhance your vanilla vibes with these:

- ✅ **Fresh Animations** (mobs)
- ✅ **Fancy Crops** & **Fancy Beds**
- ✅ **Recoloured Containers**
- ✅ **Clearer Slot Highlight**
- ✅ **Totem & Eating Animation Packs**
- ✅ **Revamped Mobs (Creepers, Endermen, Piglins, Illagers)**

---

## 💡 Shaders Included

Plug and play with your favorite look:

- 🌅 **Complementary Reimagined**
- 🌌 **BSL + BSLC**
- ⚡ **MakeUp UltraFast**
- 🌈 **FastPBR**
- 🌠 **Kappa**
- 👻 **Spooklementary**

Compatible with **Iris + Sodium** for the best performance and visuals combo!

---

## 🔧 Recommended Settings

| Setting        | Value               |
|----------------|---------------------|
| Render Distance| 10–16 chunks        |
| Shader Engine  | Iris (pre-installed)|
| UI Scale       | Auto or 2x          |
| Resource Packs | Enable all          |

---

## 📥 Installation

1. 📦 Install the modpack using Modrinth Launcher
2. 🕹️ Launch Your Game
3. 🧩 Select the included shader from the video settings (Iris)
4. ✅ Enjoy your reimagined vanilla experience!

---

---

## 🧠 Credits

Big thanks to all the amazing mod developers and artists whose work brings this pack to life!

---

> ❤️ Made with love for players who want **the vanilla feel — but better**.
